title: Module promotion and HookOutcome::Modify
purpose: The existing hooks.rs is a single 493-line file approaching the 500-line limit. Promoting it to a folder module makes room for the config, shell, matcher, and I/O submodules that follow. At the same time, HookOutcome gains a Modify variant so pre-tool hooks can rewrite tool arguments before execution — a prerequisite for config-driven hooks that modify input. HookType is expanded to cover all blocking hook categories.
task: Promote crates/norn/src/integration/hooks.rs to a folder module at crates/norn/src/integration/hooks/. Move the existing code into hooks/traits.rs with no logic changes. Create hooks/mod.rs with pub mod and re-exports. Add a HookOutcome::Modify { updated_input: serde_json::Value } variant. Update tool_dispatch.rs execute_tool_call to handle Modify by replacing model_args and serializing modified args before calling execute_single_tool. Expand HookType in error.rs with all blocking hook categories. Update integration/mod.rs re-exports. All existing tests must pass unchanged.

requirements.title: Promote hooks.rs to hooks/ folder module
requirements.spec: The integration/hooks.rs file SHALL be replaced by an integration/hooks/ directory containing mod.rs (pub mod + re-exports only) and traits.rs (all existing code moved verbatim). The public API surface SHALL NOT change — all types, traits, and functions previously exported from hooks.rs SHALL be re-exported from hooks/mod.rs.
acceptance: crates/norn/src/integration/hooks/ directory exists
crates/norn/src/integration/hooks/mod.rs contains only pub mod and pub use statements
crates/norn/src/integration/hooks/traits.rs contains all code previously in hooks.rs
crates/norn/src/integration/hooks.rs no longer exists
integration/mod.rs re-exports unchanged: Hook, HookOutcome, HookRegistry, LlmCallSummary, PostLlmHook, PostToolHook, PreLlmHook, PreToolHook, SessionEventHook
All existing tests in the hooks module pass without modification
grep for 'use crate::integration::hooks' across the workspace finds no broken imports

requirements.title: HookOutcome::Modify variant
requirements.spec: HookOutcome SHALL have a third variant Modify { updated_input: serde_json::Value } alongside Proceed and Block. The Modify variant SHALL carry the replacement tool arguments as a JSON value.
acceptance: HookOutcome has three variants: Proceed, Block { reason: String }, Modify { updated_input: serde_json::Value }
HookOutcome derives Clone and Debug
Existing tests matching on Proceed/Block still compile
Test: construct Modify with a JSON object, pattern match extracts updated_input

requirements.title: Modify handling in tool_dispatch.rs
requirements.spec: WHEN run_pre_tool returns HookOutcome::Modify, tool_dispatch.rs execute_tool_call SHALL replace the tool call arguments with the modified value and pass the serialized modified args to execute_single_tool. pre_validate SHALL see the modified args. The original tc.arguments SHALL NOT be passed to execute_single_tool when Modify is returned.
acceptance: execute_tool_call checks for Modify after the pre-hook dispatch (alongside Block check)
On Modify: model_args replaced with updated_input value
On Modify: updated_input serialized to JSON string via serde_json::to_string
Serialized modified args passed to execute_single_tool instead of tc.arguments
On Proceed: existing behaviour unchanged — tc.arguments passed as before
Test: register a PreToolHook that returns Modify, verify execute_single_tool receives modified args

requirements.title: HookType enum expansion
requirements.spec: HookType in error.rs SHALL enumerate all hook categories that can produce a Block outcome: PreTool, PreLlm, UserPrompt, Stop, SubagentStop, PreCompaction.
acceptance: HookType has 6 variants: PreTool, PreLlm, UserPrompt, Stop, SubagentStop, PreCompaction
HookType derives Clone, Debug, PartialEq, Eq
Existing HookType::PreLlm usage in runner.rs unchanged
tool_dispatch.rs Block path uses HookType::PreTool (currently no HookType used for tool blocks — this is new)

requirements.title: Hook enum variant readiness for new traits
requirements.spec: The Hook enum in traits.rs SHALL be documented as extensible for NH-002's new trait variants. This brief SHALL NOT add the new variants (that is NH-002), but SHALL ensure the enum and HookRegistry are structured for clean extension.
acceptance: Hook enum has doc comment noting it will be extended by NH-002
HookRegistry struct fields are private with per-category accessors (already the case — verify preserved)
No logic changes to existing dispatch methods

boundaries: SHALL NOT add new hook traits — that is NH-002
SHALL NOT add config types, matchers, or shell execution — those are NH-003 through NH-005
SHALL NOT modify HookRegistry dispatch methods beyond what is needed for Modify handling
SHALL NOT add todo!() or unimplemented!() macros anywhere
verification: crates/norn/src/integration/hooks.rs does not exist (replaced by hooks/ directory)
crates/norn/src/integration/hooks/mod.rs contains only pub mod and pub use
No file exceeds 500 lines of code (excluding tests, comments, whitespace)
